allegation: Fraud by false representation, contrary to section 1 of the Fraud Act 2006

courtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that bank statement summaries are served but full transaction export, source banking records, and tracing material remain outstanding.
clientSummaryPreview:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Isla Grant). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. Bank statement summaries are on the papers, but the full transaction export, source banking records, and beneficiary tracing material are still outstanding. Summaries alone do not show the full account picture.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
doNotOverstate: Do not treat bank summaries alone as proof of fraud or account attribution.

proofReceipts.outputLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that bank statement summaries are served but full transaction export, source banking records, and tracing material remain outstanding.
Please provide Full transaction export (see MG6C/FRD/02) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
Please provide Source banking records (see MG6C/FRD/03) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
Please provide Beneficiary tracing report (see MG6C/FRD/04) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
